back_translation: Hallelujah! I will give thanks to the LORD with all my heart, in the council of the upright and in the assembly.
Great are the works of the LORD; they are pondered by all who delight in them.
His work is full of splendor and majesty, and His righteousness endures forever.
He has caused His wonders to be remembered; the LORD is gracious and compassionate.
He provides food for those who fear Him; He remembers His covenant forever.
He has shown His people the power of His works, giving them the inheritance of the nations.
The works of His hands are truth and justice; all His precepts are trustworthy.
They are upheld forever and ever, enacted in truth and uprightness.
He sent redemption to His people; He ordained His covenant forever; holy and awesome is His name.
The fear of the LORD is the beginning of wisdom; all who follow His precepts gain good understanding. His praise endures forever.
